message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor Black
  ActorBorderColor Black
  ActorBackgroundColor White
  ParticipantBorderColor Black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor White
}

participant "VideoSink" as VideoSink
participant "VideoDecoder" as VideoDecoder
participant "VideoReceiver" as VideoReceiver
participant "RTSPSession" as RTSPSession
participant "Transcoder" as Transcoder
participant "DTLS" as DTLS

activate VideoReceiver
note over VideoReceiver: Receive RTP
deactivate VideoReceiver

activate RTSPSession
activate Transcoder
activate DTLS

box "OutputPacket" #LightYellow
end box

box "AsyncUDP Packet" #LightBlue
end box

box "SignalReadEvent" #LightGreen
end box

box "OnDataReceived" #LightCyan
end box

box "Receive Video" #LightPink
end box

box "Resume" #LightOrange
end box

box "StartNewVideoCodec" #LightGray
end box

box "VideoDecoderWrapper" #Lavender
end box

box "VideoDecoderCallback" #Plum
end box

box "IncomingVideoStream" #Thistle
end box

box "WMRVideoStreamWrapper" #Violet
end box

box "SurfaceVideoRenderer" #Wheat
end box

VideoReceiver -> AsyncUDP Packet : OnDataReceived()
AsyncUDP Packet -> SignalReadEvent : ReadFromAsyncUDPSocket()
SignalReadEvent -> OutputPacket : ProcessConnection()
OutputPacket -> Transcoder : WriteToTranscoder()
Transcoder -> OutputPacket : OnDataReceived()
OutputPacket -> RTSPSession : OnDataReceived()
RTSPSession -> Transcoder : OnDataReceived()
Transcoder -> OutputPacket : OnDataReceived()
OutputPacket -> VideoReceiver : OnDataReceived()
VideoReceiver -> IncomingVideoStream : StartNewVideoCodec()
IncomingVideoStream -> VideoDecoder : OnFrame()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoderCallback : OnFrame()
VideoDecoderCallback -> VideoDecoderWrapper : OnFrame()
VideoDecoderWrapper -> WMRVideoStreamWrapper : OnFrame()
WMRVideoStreamWrapper -> SurfaceVideoRenderer : OnFrame()

@enduml
```
